name: Multi-file Refactor
prompt: Refactor the user service to separate authentication logic into its own module. The auth module should handle token generation, validation, and refresh. Update all imports across the codebase.
expectedAnswer: A separate auth module at src/services/auth-service.ts containing generateToken, verifyPassword, and token refresh logic. UserService imports from the new module. All existing tests pass.
criticalRequirements: Auth logic is in a separate file
No functionality is lost during refactor
gradingGuidelines: Award full marks if the refactor cleanly separates concerns without breaking existing behavior. Deduct points for leaving dead code or missing import updates.

scoringDimensions.name: correctness
scoringDimensions.description: Code compiles and existing behavior is preserved

scoringDimensions.name: design
scoringDimensions.description: Clean separation of concerns, appropriate interfaces

scoringDimensions.name: completeness
scoringDimensions.description: All imports updated, no dead code
